spec.description: A seamless dark repeating background tile for a mobile Block Blast menu and gameplay screen. Low-contrast rounded square block motif arranged on a grid, deep navy base, subtle teal, indigo, violet, amber and coral squares at very low opacity, faint glossy arcs at the corners, no paw prints, no text, no logo. The edges must repeat cleanly with no obvious seam and remain quiet behind UI.
spec.name: bb-background-tile

phrases: flat color blocks with minimal texture

warnings: generated image resized from 1024x1024 to 256x256

spec.description: Single isolated square block tile sprite for Block Blast board pieces, generated as a chroma-key source for a transparent final PNG. Chunky rounded-square silhouette, faceted gem face, beveled warm gold rim, glossy white highlights, subtle inner facets, arcade jewel polish matching the shipped Block Blast title capture. Centered with generous padding. Use a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal: the background must be one uniform #00ff00 color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflection, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject. No cast shadow, no contact shadow, no text, no logo, no watermark. Color direction: amber gold gem face, honey-orange facets and bright yellow highlights.
spec.name: bb-block-tile-amber

phrases: flat color blocks with minimal texture

warnings: generated image resized from 1024x1024 to 128x128
postprocessed: chroma-key background removed to alpha with remove_chroma_key.py
postprocessed: transparent bounds fit to 112x112 within the 128x128 sprite canvas

design/assets/ribbon-fail.svg.provenance: Block Blast v2 seed fail ribbon authored for this port; no v1 ribbon asset exists.

design/assets/ribbon-win.svg.provenance: Block Blast v2 seed result ribbon authored for this port; no v1 ribbon asset exists.

notes: Block Blast design assets include seed result ribbons plus pixelsmith-generated gameplay block sprites and a subtle repeating background tile for menu/game surfaces.
